context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies the skill's error handling matrix (transcript/slides success/fail to correct outcome categories), slide source determination logic, skip-for-missing-sources rules, and additive summary update policy.

checklist.name: Full success categorized correctly
checklist.description: Talks where both transcript and slides succeeded (Microservices Myths, Platform Engineering) get a status indicating full successful processing — distinguishable from partial or failed outcomes

checklist.name: Transcript fail + slides OK = partial
checklist.description: Talks where transcript failed but slides succeeded (Security Shift Left) get a status indicating partial processing — distinguishable from both full success and full failure

checklist.name: Slides fail + transcript OK = partial
checklist.description: Talks where transcript succeeded but slides failed (DevOps Culture Reset) get the same partial status category as the transcript-fail case — both are partial outcomes

checklist.name: Both fail = skip/fail status
checklist.description: Talks where both transcript and slides failed (GitOps Journey) get a status indicating download failure — distinguishable from partial processing and from the missing-sources skip

checklist.name: Missing sources = distinct skip
checklist.description: Container Security Deep Dive (no video_url, no slides_url, no pptx_path) gets a skip status that is distinct from the download-failure status — it was never attempted, not failed

checklist.name: No video = not processable
checklist.description: Testing in Production (has slides_url but no video_url) is treated as not processable — a talk requires video_url to enter the processing pipeline, regardless of other sources

checklist.name: Slide source set to pptx
checklist.description: Platform Engineering (has pptx_path but no slides_url) gets slide_source indicating PPTX as the source

checklist.name: Slide source set to both
checklist.description: Talks with both slides_url and pptx_path (Microservices Myths, GitOps Journey) get slide_source indicating both sources are available

checklist.name: Slide source set to pdf
checklist.description: Talks with only slides_url and no pptx_path (DevOps Culture, Security Shift Left) get slide_source indicating PDF as the source

checklist.name: Summary additive only
checklist.description: The updated rhetoric summary preserves ALL existing content from the original (Section 1, 2, 4, 7, 15 text is still present) — nothing was deleted or replaced

checklist.name: Summary has new content
checklist.description: The updated rhetoric summary adds new observations from the successfully processed talks (at least one new pattern or refinement added)
